meaning: <拉>int.瞧!看哪!(多用以指给人看被迫害的人)
examples: Let's consult the proofs of Ecce Homo, one of the last documents Nietzsche read in Turin.
It contains the facsimile production of Ecce Homo, Nietzsche's autobiography, including a transcription and commentary.
Objective To evaluate the effect of small incision extracapsular cataract extraction (ECCE) for high myopia with cataract.
Participation in ECCE programmes has increased worldwide in the past decade, but progress remains insufficient and uneven.
It also plans to review global progress in ECCE and set standards and targets in for 2015 and beyond.
